headline: Is It Time To Reassess General Motors (GM) After Its 75% One Year Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether General Motors at around US$82 a share still offers value, the key is understanding how its current price lines up with different valuation yardsticks. The stock has pulled back around 1.4% over the last week, yet it is up 4.3% over 30 days, 1.4% year to date and 74.6% over the past year, with a 133.7% return over three years and 39.0% over five years. This naturally raises questions about how much of the story is already priced in. Recent market attention has...

headline: Best paid board members at 3 southeast Michigan companies
summary: These highly lucrative positions can pay around $300,000 a year in cash and stock awards and involve a few hours a week of time.
